title: Fix public lease listings not displaying

requirements.text: Fix the public query method in backend/main.mo to ensure it returns all lease listings without requiring authentication, and verify it is properly exposed as a public query function

quotes: Make sure the public query/fetch function in the canister is correctly implemented and called by the frontend component. Use a public query method (no auth required) to get the list of leases.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a public query method that returns all lease listings
Method does not require authentication or authorization
Method can be successfully called from the frontend without Internet Identity login

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/LeaseListings.tsx to properly fetch and display all existing lease entries from the backend, showing partial lease code (first 4 chars + '...' + first 4 chars after last hyphen, e.g., '2793...2003'), split ratio (e.g., '60/40'), and availability status with proper styling (green for Available, red/grayed for Unavailable)

quotes: The public lease listings section (e.g., table/cards on homepage showing available ULO leases) now properly fetches and displays ALL existing lease entries from storage. Show for each: Partial lease code (first 4 chars + '...' + first 4 chars after last hyphen, e.g., '2793...2003'), Split ratio (e.g., '60/40'), Availability status (e.g., 'Available' in green or 'Unavailable' in red/grayed)

acceptanceCriteria: Component fetches all lease listings using the public query method
Each listing displays partial lease code in the specified format
Available status shown in green, Unavailable status shown in red/grayed
Nickname field is NOT displayed on public side

requirements.text: Add a copy full code button for each lease listing that copies the complete UUID to clipboard when clicked, and disable/grey out this button when the lease is unavailable with a message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'

quotes: Copy full code button (copies the complete UUID to clipboard when clicked)
If unavailable: disable/grey the copy button + show message like 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'

acceptanceCriteria: Each lease listing has a copy button
Clicking the button copies the full lease code UUID to clipboard
When lease is unavailable, button is disabled and grayed out
Unavailable leases show message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'
Copy functionality uses JavaScript clipboard API

requirements.text: Handle empty lease listings state by displaying a friendly message like 'No leases available yet — check back soon!' when the backend returns an empty array

quotes: Handle cases where array is empty (show a message like 'No leases available yet — check back soon!' or similar).

acceptanceCriteria: When no leases exist, component displays empty state message
Empty state does not show errors or loading spinners

constraints: Do not modify the admin dashboard functionality — it is working correctly
Do not display Nickname field on the public frontend
Preserve Internet Identity authentication locked to the admin principal
Maintain app download links for iOS/Android Unity app
nonGoals: Changes to admin dashboard interface or functionality
Modifications to authentication or authorization logic
Adding new fields to lease listings
Styling changes beyond status color coding
